  3→import com.fsck.k9.backend.api.BackendFolderUpdater
  4→import com.fsck.k9.backend.api.BackendStorage
  5→import com.fsck.k9.backend.api.FolderInfo
  6→import com.fsck.k9.mail.AuthenticationFailedException
  7→import com.fsck.k9.mail.FolderType
  8→import com.fsck.k9.mail.MessagingException
  9→import rs.ltt.jmap.client.JmapClient
 10→import rs.ltt.jmap.client.api.ErrorResponseException
 11→import rs.ltt.jmap.client.api.InvalidSessionResourceException
 12→import rs.ltt.jmap.client.api.MethodErrorResponseException
 13→import rs.ltt.jmap.client.api.UnauthorizedException
 14→import rs.ltt.jmap.common.Request.Invocation.ResultReference
 15→import rs.ltt.jmap.common.entity.Mailbox
 16→import rs.ltt.jmap.common.entity.Role
 17→import rs.ltt.jmap.common.method.call.mailbox.ChangesMailboxMethodCall
 18→import rs.ltt.jmap.common.method.call.mailbox.GetMailboxMethodCall
 19→import rs.ltt.jmap.common.method.response.mailbox.ChangesMailboxMethodResponse
 20→import rs.ltt.jmap.common.method.response.mailbox.GetMailboxMethodResponse
 21→
 22→internal class CommandRefreshFolderList(
 23→    private val backendStorage: BackendStorage,
 24→    private val jmapClient: JmapClient,
 25→    private val accountId: String,
 26→) {
 27→    fun refreshFolderList() {
 28→        try {
 29→            backendStorage.createFolderUpdater().use { folderUpdater ->
 30→                val state = backendStorage.getExtraString(STATE)
 31→                if (state == null) {
 32→                    fetchMailboxes(folderUpdater)
 33→                } else {
 34→                    fetchMailboxUpdates(folderUpdater, state)
 35→                }
 36→            }
 37→        } catch (e: UnauthorizedException) {
 38→            throw AuthenticationFailedException("Authentication failed", e)
 39→        } catch (e: InvalidSessionResourceException) {
 40→            throw MessagingException(e.message, true, e)
 41→        } catch (e: ErrorResponseException) {
 42→            throw MessagingException(e.message, true, e)
 43→        } catch (e: MethodErrorResponseException) {
 44→            throw MessagingException(e.message, e.isPermanentError, e)
 45→        } catch (e: Exception) {
 46→            throw MessagingException(e)
 47→        }
 48→    }
 49→
 50→    private fun fetchMailboxes(folderUpdater: BackendFolderUpdater) {
 51→        val call = jmapClient.call(
 52→            GetMailboxMethodCall.builder().accountId(accountId).build(),
 53→        )
 54→        val response = call.getMainResponseBlocking<GetMailboxMethodResponse>()
 55→        val foldersOnServer = response.list
 56→
 57→        val oldFolderServerIds = backendStorage.getFolderServerIds()
 58→        val (foldersToUpdate, foldersToCreate) = foldersOnServer.partition { it.id in oldFolderServerIds }
 59→
 60→        for (folder in foldersToUpdate) {
 61→            folderUpdater.changeFolder(folder.id, folder.name, folder.type)
 62→        }
 63→
 64→        val newFolders = foldersToCreate.map { folder ->
 65→            FolderInfo(folder.id, folder.name, folder.type)
 66→        }
 67→        folderUpdater.createFolders(newFolders)
 68→
 69→        val newFolderServerIds = foldersOnServer.map { it.id }
 70→        val removedFolderServerIds = oldFolderServerIds - newFolderServerIds
 71→        folderUpdater.deleteFolders(removedFolderServerIds)
 72→
 73→        backendStorage.setExtraString(STATE, response.state)
 74→    }
 75→
 76→    private fun fetchMailboxUpdates(folderUpdater: BackendFolderUpdater, state: String) {
 77→        try {
 78→            fetchAllMailboxChanges(folderUpdater, state)
 79→        } catch (e: MethodErrorResponseException) {
 80→            if (e.methodErrorResponse.type == ERROR_CANNOT_CALCULATE_CHANGES) {
 81→                fetchMailboxes(folderUpdater)
 82→            } else {
 83→                throw e
 84→            }
 85→        }
 86→    }
 87→
 88→    private fun fetchAllMailboxChanges(folderUpdater: BackendFolderUpdater, state: String) {
 89→        var currentState = state
 90→        do {
 91→            val (newState, hasMoreChanges) = fetchMailboxChanges(folderUpdater, currentState)
 92→            currentState = newState
 93→        } while (hasMoreChanges)
 94→    }
 95→
 96→    private fun fetchMailboxChanges(folderUpdater: BackendFolderUpdater, state: String): UpdateState {
 97→        val multiCall = jmapClient.newMultiCall()
 98→        val mailboxChangesCall = multiCall.call(
 99→            ChangesMailboxMethodCall.builder()
100→                .accountId(accountId)
101→                .sinceState(state)
102→                .build(),
103→        )
104→        val createdMailboxesCall = multiCall.call(
105→            GetMailboxMethodCall.builder()
106→                .accountId(accountId)
107→                .idsReference(mailboxChangesCall.createResultReference(ResultReference.Path.CREATED))
108→                .build(),
109→        )
110→        val changedMailboxesCall = multiCall.call(
111→            GetMailboxMethodCall.builder()
112→                .accountId(accountId)
113→                .idsReference(mailboxChangesCall.createResultReference(ResultReference.Path.UPDATED))
114→                .build(),
115→        )
116→        multiCall.execute()
117→
118→        val mailboxChangesResponse = mailboxChangesCall.getMainResponseBlocking<ChangesMailboxMethodResponse>()
119→        val createdMailboxResponse = createdMailboxesCall.getMainResponseBlocking<GetMailboxMethodResponse>()
120→        val changedMailboxResponse = changedMailboxesCall.getMainResponseBlocking<GetMailboxMethodResponse>()
121→
122→        val foldersToCreate = createdMailboxResponse.list.map { folder ->
123→            FolderInfo(folder.id, folder.name, folder.type)
124→        }
125→        folderUpdater.createFolders(foldersToCreate)
126→
127→        for (folder in changedMailboxResponse.list) {
128→            folderUpdater.changeFolder(folder.id, folder.name, folder.type)
129→        }
130→
131→        val destroyed = mailboxChangesResponse.destroyed
132→        destroyed?.let {
133→            folderUpdater.deleteFolders(it.toList())
134→        }
135→
136→        backendStorage.setExtraString(STATE, mailboxChangesResponse.newState)
137→
138→        return UpdateState(
139→            state = mailboxChangesResponse.newState,
140→            hasMoreChanges = mailboxChangesResponse.isHasMoreChanges,
141→        )
142→    }
143→
144→    private val Mailbox.type: FolderType
145→        get() = when (role) {
146→            Role.INBOX -> FolderType.INBOX
147→            Role.ARCHIVE -> FolderType.ARCHIVE
148→            Role.DRAFTS -> FolderType.DRAFTS
149→            Role.SENT -> FolderType.SENT
150→            Role.TRASH -> FolderType.TRASH
151→            Role.JUNK -> FolderType.SPAM
152→            else -> FolderType.REGULAR
153→        }
154→
155→    private val MethodErrorResponseException.isPermanentError: Boolean
156→        get() = methodErrorResponse.type != ERROR_SERVER_UNAVAILABLE
157→
158→    companion object {
159→        private const val STATE = "jmapState"
160→        private const val ERROR_SERVER_UNAVAILABLE = "serverUnavailable"
161→        private const val ERROR_CANNOT_CALCULATE_CHANGES = "cannotCalculateChanges"
162→    }
163→
164→    private data class UpdateState(val state: String, val hasMoreChanges: Boolean)
165→}

363→            serializer.endTag(null, DESCRIPTION_ELEMENT)
364→        }
365→
366→        // Write identity settings
367→        serializer.startTag(null, SETTINGS_ELEMENT)
368→        for ((key, value) in prefs) {
369→            val valueString = value.toString()
370→
371→            val comps = key.split(".")
372→            if (comps.size < 3) {
373→                // Skip non-identity config entries
374→                continue
375→            }
376→
377→            val keyUuid = comps[0]
378→            val identityKey = comps[1]
379→            val identityIndex = comps[2]
380→            if (keyUuid != accountUuid || identityIndex != identity) {
381→                // Skip entries that belong to another identity
382→                continue
383→            }
384→
385→            val versionedSetting = IdentitySettingsDescriptions.SETTINGS[identityKey]
386→            if (versionedSetting != null) {
387→                val highestVersion = versionedSetting.lastKey()
388→                val setting = versionedSetting[highestVersion]
389→                if (setting != null) {
390→                    // Only write settings that have an entry in IdentitySettings.SETTINGS
391→                    try {
392→                        writeKeyAndPrettyValueFromSetting(serializer, identityKey, setting, valueString)
393→                    } catch (e: InvalidSettingValueException) {
394→                        Timber.w(
395→                            "Identity setting \"%s\" has invalid value \"%s\" in preference storage. " +
396→                                "This shouldn't happen!",
397→                            identityKey,
398→                            valueString,
399→                        )
400→                    }
401→                }
402→            }
403→        }
404→        serializer.endTag(null, SETTINGS_ELEMENT)
405→
406→        serializer.endTag(null, IDENTITY_ELEMENT)
407→    }
408→
409→    private fun writeFolder(serializer: XmlSerializer, folder: FolderSettings) {
410→        serializer.startTag(null, FOLDER_ELEMENT)
411→        serializer.attribute(null, NAME_ATTRIBUTE, folder.serverId)
412→
413→        // Write folder settings
414→        writeFolderSetting(serializer, "integrate", folder.isIntegrate.toString())
415→        writeFolderSetting(serializer, "inTopGroup", folder.isInTopGroup.toString())
416→        writeFolderSetting(serializer, "syncEnabled", folder.isSyncEnabled.toString())
417→        writeFolderSetting(serializer, "visible", folder.isVisible.toString())
418→        writeFolderSetting(serializer, "notificationsEnabled", folder.isNotificationsEnabled.toString())
419→        writeFolderSetting(serializer, "pushEnabled", folder.isPushEnabled.toString())
420→
421→        serializer.endTag(null, FOLDER_ELEMENT)
422→    }
423→
424→    private fun writeFolderSetting(serializer: XmlSerializer, key: String, value: String) {
425→        val versionedSetting = FolderSettingsDescriptions.SETTINGS[key]
426→        if (versionedSetting != null) {
427→            val highestVersion = versionedSetting.lastKey()
428→            val setting = versionedSetting[highestVersion]
429→            if (setting != null) {
430→                // Only write settings that have an entry in FolderSettings.SETTINGS
431→                try {
432→                    writeKeyAndPrettyValueFromSetting(serializer, key, setting, value)
433→                } catch (e: InvalidSettingValueException) {
434→                    Timber.w(
435→                        "Folder setting \"%s\" has invalid value \"%s\" in preference storage. This shouldn't happen!",
436→                        key,
437→                        value,
438→                    )
439→                }
440→            }
441→        }
442→    }
443→
444→    private fun writeElement(serializer: XmlSerializer, elementName: String, value: String?) {
445→        if (value != null) {
446→            serializer.startTag(null, elementName)
447→            serializer.text(value)
448→            serializer.endTag(null, elementName)
449→        }
450→    }
451→
452→    private fun <T> writeKeyAndPrettyValueFromSetting(
453→        serializer: XmlSerializer,
454→        key: String,
455→        setting: SettingsDescription<T>,
456→        valueString: String,
457→    ) {
458→        val value = setting.fromString(valueString)
459→        val outputValue = setting.toPrettyString(value)
460→        writeKeyAndPrettyValueFromSetting(serializer, key, outputValue)
461→    }
462→
463→    private fun <T> writeKeyAndDefaultValueFromSetting(
464→        serializer: XmlSerializer,
465→        key: String,
466→        setting: SettingsDescription<T>,
467→    ) {
468→        val value = setting.getDefaultValue()
469→        val outputValue = setting.toPrettyString(value)
470→        writeKeyAndPrettyValueFromSetting(serializer, key, outputValue)
471→    }
472→
473→    private fun writeKeyAndPrettyValueFromSetting(serializer: XmlSerializer, key: String, literalValue: String?) {
474→        serializer.startTag(null, VALUE_ELEMENT)
475→        serializer.attribute(null, KEY_ATTRIBUTE, key)
476→        if (literalValue != null) {
477→            serializer.text(literalValue)
478→        }
479→        serializer.endTag(null, VALUE_ELEMENT)
480→    }
481→
482→    fun generateDatedExportFileName(): String {
483→        val now = Calendar.getInstance()
484→        val dateFormat = SimpleDateFormat("yyyy-MM-dd", Locale.US)
485→        return String.format("%s_%s.%s", EXPORT_FILENAME_PREFIX, dateFormat.format(now.time), EXPORT_FILENAME_SUFFIX)
486→    }

 30→class ManageFoldersFragment : Fragment() {
 31→    private val viewModel: ManageFoldersViewModel by viewModel()
 32→    private val folderNameFormatter: FolderNameFormatter by inject()
 33→    private val messagingController: MessagingController by inject()
 34→    private val preferences: Preferences by inject()
 35→    private val folderIconProvider: FolderIconProvider by inject { parametersOf(requireActivity().theme) }
 36→
 37→    private lateinit var account: Account
 38→    private lateinit var itemAdapter: ItemAdapter<FolderListItem>
 39→
 40→    override fun onCreate(savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {
 41→        super.onCreate(savedInstanceState)
 42→        setHasOptionsMenu(true)
 43→
 44→        val arguments = arguments ?: error("Missing arguments")
 45→        val accountUuid = arguments.getString(EXTRA_ACCOUNT) ?: error("Missing argument '$EXTRA_ACCOUNT'")
 46→        account = preferences.getAccount(accountUuid) ?: error("Missing account: $accountUuid")
 47→    }
 48→
 49→    override fun onCreateView(inflater: LayoutInflater, container: ViewGroup?, savedInstanceState: Bundle?): View? {
 50→        return inflater.inflate(R.layout.fragment_manage_folders, container, false)
 51→    }
 52→
 53→    override fun onViewCreated(view: View, savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {
 54→        initializeFolderList()
 55→
 56→        viewModel.getFolders(account).observeNotNull(this) { folders ->
 57→            updateFolderList(folders)
 58→        }
 59→    }
 60→
 61→    private fun initializeFolderList() {
 62→        itemAdapter = ItemAdapter()
 63→        itemAdapter.itemFilter.filterPredicate = ::folderListFilter
 64→
 65→        val folderListAdapter = FastAdapter.with(itemAdapter).apply {
 66→            setHasStableIds(true)
 67→            onClickListener = { _, _, item: FolderListItem, _ ->
 68→                openFolderSettings(item.folderId)
 69→                true
 70→            }
 71→        }
 72→
 73→        val recyclerView = requireView().findViewById<RecyclerView>(R.id.folderList)
 74→        recyclerView.adapter = folderListAdapter
 75→    }
 76→
 77→    private fun updateFolderList(displayFolders: List<DisplayFolder>) {
 78→        val folderListItems = displayFolders.map { displayFolder ->
 79→            val databaseId = displayFolder.folder.id
 80→            val folderIconResource = folderIconProvider.getFolderIcon(displayFolder.folder.type)
 81→            val displayName = folderNameFormatter.displayName(displayFolder.folder)
 82→
 83→            FolderListItem(databaseId, folderIconResource, displayName)
 84→        }
 85→
 86→        itemAdapter.set(folderListItems)
 87→    }
 88→
 89→    private fun openFolderSettings(folderId: Long) {
 90→        val folderSettingsArguments = bundleOf(
 91→            FolderSettingsFragment.EXTRA_ACCOUNT to account.uuid,
 92→            FolderSettingsFragment.EXTRA_FOLDER_ID to folderId,
 93→        )
 94→        findNavController().navigate(R.id.action_manageFoldersScreen_to_folderSettingsScreen, folderSettingsArguments)
 95→    }
 96→
 97→    override fun onCreateOptionsMenu(menu: Menu, inflater: MenuInflater) {
 98→        inflater.inflate(R.menu.folder_list_option, menu)
 99→        configureFolderSearchView(menu)
100→    }
101→
102→    private fun configureFolderSearchView(menu: Menu) {
103→        val folderMenuItem = menu.findItem(R.id.filter_folders)
104→        val folderSearchView = folderMenuItem.actionView as SearchView
105→        folderSearchView.queryHint = getString(R.string.folder_list_filter_hint)
106→        folderSearchView.setOnQueryTextListener(
107→            object : SearchView.OnQueryTextListener {
108→                override fun onQueryTextSubmit(query: String): Boolean {
109→                    itemAdapter.filter(query)
110→                    return true
111→                }
112→
113→                override fun onQueryTextChange(newText: String): Boolean {
114→                    itemAdapter.filter(newText)
115→                    return true
116→                }
117→            },
118→        )
119→    }
120→
121→    override fun onOptionsItemSelected(item: MenuItem): Boolean {
122→        when (item.itemId) {
123→            R.id.list_folders -> refreshFolderList()
124→            else -> return super.onOptionsItemSelected(item)
125→        }
126→
127→        return true
128→    }
129→
130→    private fun refreshFolderList() {
131→        messagingController.refreshFolderList(account)
132→    }
133→
134→    private fun folderListFilter(item: FolderListItem, constraint: CharSequence?): Boolean {
135→        if (constraint.isNullOrEmpty()) return true
136→
137→        val locale = Locale.getDefault()
138→        val displayName = item.displayName.lowercase(locale)
139→        return constraint.splitToSequence(" ")
140→            .filter { it.isNotEmpty() }
141→            .map { it.lowercase(locale) }
142→            .any { it in displayName }
143→    }
144→
145→    companion object {
146→        const val EXTRA_ACCOUNT = "account"
147→    }
148→}

 24→class SettingsExporter(
 25→    private val contentResolver: ContentResolver,
 26→    private val preferences: Preferences,
 27→    private val folderSettingsProvider: FolderSettingsProvider,
 28→    private val folderRepository: FolderRepository,
 29→    private val notificationSettingsUpdater: NotificationSettingsUpdater,
 30→) {
 31→    @Throws(SettingsImportExportException::class)
 32→    fun exportToUri(includeGlobals: Boolean, accountUuids: Set<String>, uri: Uri) {
 33→        try {
 34→            contentResolver.openOutputStream(uri, "wt")!!.use { outputStream ->
 35→                exportPreferences(outputStream, includeGlobals, accountUuids, includePasswords = false)
 36→            }
 37→        } catch (e: Exception) {
 38→            throw SettingsImportExportException(e)
 39→        }
 40→    }
 41→
 42→    @Throws(SettingsImportExportException::class)
 43→    fun exportPreferences(
 44→        outputStream: OutputStream,
 45→        includeGlobals: Boolean,
 46→        accountUuids: Set<String>,
 47→        includePasswords: Boolean,
 48→    ) {
 49→        updateNotificationSettings(accountUuids)
 50→
 51→        try {
 52→            val serializer = Xml.newSerializer()
 53→            serializer.setOutput(outputStream, "UTF-8")
 54→
 55→            serializer.startDocument(null, true)
 56→
 57→            // Output with indentation
 58→            serializer.setFeature("http://xmlpull.org/v1/doc/features.html#indent-output", true)
 59→
 60→            serializer.startTag(null, ROOT_ELEMENT)
 61→            serializer.attribute(null, VERSION_ATTRIBUTE, Settings.VERSION.toString())
 62→            serializer.attribute(null, FILE_FORMAT_ATTRIBUTE, FILE_FORMAT_VERSION.toString())
 63→
 64→            Timber.i("Exporting preferences")
 65→
 66→            val storage = preferences.storage
 67→
 68→            val prefs: Map<String, Any> = storage.all.toSortedMap()
 69→            if (includeGlobals) {
 70→                serializer.startTag(null, GLOBAL_ELEMENT)
 71→                writeSettings(serializer, prefs)
 72→                serializer.endTag(null, GLOBAL_ELEMENT)
 73→            }
 74→
 75→            serializer.startTag(null, ACCOUNTS_ELEMENT)
 76→            for (accountUuid in accountUuids) {
 77→                preferences.getAccount(accountUuid)?.let { account ->
 78→                    writeAccount(serializer, account, prefs, includePasswords)
 79→                }
 80→            }
 81→            serializer.endTag(null, ACCOUNTS_ELEMENT)
 82→
 83→            serializer.endTag(null, ROOT_ELEMENT)
 84→            serializer.endDocument()
 85→            serializer.flush()
 86→        } catch (e: Exception) {
 87→            throw SettingsImportExportException(e.localizedMessage, e)
 88→        }
 89→    }
 90→
 91→    private fun updateNotificationSettings(accountUuids: Set<String>) {
 92→        try {
 93→            notificationSettingsUpdater.updateNotificationSettings(accountUuids)
 94→        } catch (e: Exception) {
 95→            // An error here could mean we export notification settings that don't reflect the current configuration
 96→            // of the notification channels. But we prefer stale data over failing the export.
 97→            Timber.w(e, "Error while updating accounts with notification configuration from system")
 98→        }
 99→    }
100→
101→    private fun writeSettings(serializer: XmlSerializer, prefs: Map<String, Any>) {
102→        for ((key, versions) in GeneralSettingsDescriptions.SETTINGS) {
103→            val valueString = prefs[key] as String?
104→            val highestVersion = versions.lastKey()
105→            val setting = versions[highestVersion] ?: continue // Setting was removed
106→
107→            if (valueString != null) {
108→                try {
109→                    writeKeyAndPrettyValueFromSetting(serializer, key, setting, valueString)
110→                } catch (e: InvalidSettingValueException) {
111→                    Timber.w(
112→                        "Global setting \"%s\" has invalid value \"%s\" in preference storage. This shouldn't happen!",
113→                        key,
114→                        valueString,
115→                    )
116→                }
117→            } else {
118→                Timber.d("Couldn't find key \"%s\" in preference storage. Using default value.", key)
119→                writeKeyAndDefaultValueFromSetting(serializer, key, setting)
120→            }
121→        }
122→    }

132→
133→        serializer.startTag(null, ACCOUNT_ELEMENT)

137→        if (name != null) {

139→            serializer.text(name)

 7→class FolderSettingsProvider(private val folderRepository: FolderRepository) {
 8→    fun getFolderSettings(account: Account): List<FolderSettings> {
 9→        return folderRepository.getRemoteFolderDetails(account)
10→            .filterNot { it.containsOnlyDefaultValues() }
11→            .map { it.toFolderSettings() }
12→    }
13→
14→    private fun RemoteFolderDetails.containsOnlyDefaultValues(): Boolean {
15→        return isInTopGroup == getDefaultValue("inTopGroup") &&
16→            isIntegrate == getDefaultValue("integrate") &&
17→            isSyncEnabled == getDefaultValue("syncEnabled") &&
18→            isVisible == getDefaultValue("visible") &&
19→            isNotificationsEnabled == getDefaultValue("notificationsEnabled") &&
20→            isPushEnabled == getDefaultValue("pushEnabled")
21→    }
22→
23→    private fun getDefaultValue(key: String): Any? {
24→        val versionedSetting = FolderSettingsDescriptions.SETTINGS[key] ?: error("Key not found: $key")
25→        val highestVersion = versionedSetting.lastKey()
26→        val setting = versionedSetting[highestVersion] ?: error("Setting description not found: $key")
27→        return setting.defaultValue
28→    }

import app.k9mail.legacy.account.Account
import app.k9mail.legacy.folder.RemoteFolder
import app.k9mail.legacy.mailstore.FolderRepository
import assertk.assertThat
import assertk.assertions.isEqualTo
import com.fsck.k9.Preferences
import com.fsck.k9.mail.AuthType
import com.fsck.k9.mail.ConnectionSecurity
import com.fsck.k9.mail.FolderType
import com.fsck.k9.mail.ServerSettings
import java.util.UUID
import org.junit.Test
import org.mockito.kotlin.eq
import org.mockito.kotlin.mock
import org.mockito.kotlin.verify
import org.mockito.kotlin.whenever

class SpecialFolderUpdaterInboxFolderNameTest {
    @Test
    fun updateSpecialFolders_shouldUseLegacyInboxFolderWhenInboxTypeIsNotDetected() {
        val account = Account(UUID.randomUUID().toString()).apply {
            incomingServerSettings = ServerSettings(
                type = "imap",
                host = "example.com",
                port = 993,
                connectionSecurity = ConnectionSecurity.SSL_TLS_REQUIRED,
                authenticationType = AuthType.PLAIN,
                username = "user",
                password = "password",
                clientCertificateAlias = null,
            )
            outgoingServerSettings = ServerSettings(
                type = "smtp",
                host = "example.com",
                port = 465,
                connectionSecurity = ConnectionSecurity.SSL_TLS_REQUIRED,
                authenticationType = AuthType.PLAIN,
                username = "user",
                password = "password",
                clientCertificateAlias = null,
            )
            legacyInboxFolder = "Inbox"
            inboxFolderId = null
        }

        val inboxFolder = RemoteFolder(
            id = 1L,
            serverId = "Inbox",
            name = "Inbox",
            type = app.k9mail.core.mail.folder.api.FolderType.REGULAR,
        )

        val folderRepository: FolderRepository = mock {
            whenever(it.getRemoteFolders(eq(account))).thenReturn(listOf(inboxFolder))
        }

        val preferences: Preferences = mock()

        val specialFolderUpdater = SpecialFolderUpdater(
            preferences = preferences,
            folderRepository = folderRepository,
            specialFolderSelectionStrategy = SpecialFolderSelectionStrategy(),
            account = account,
        )

        specialFolderUpdater.updateSpecialFolders()

        assertThat(account.inboxFolderId).isEqualTo(1L)

        verify(folderRepository).setIncludeInUnifiedInbox(eq(account), eq(1L), eq(true))
        verify(folderRepository).setVisible(eq(account), eq(1L), eq(true))
        verify(folderRepository).setSyncEnabled(eq(account), eq(1L), eq(true))
        verify(folderRepository).setNotificationsEnabled(eq(account), eq(1L), eq(true))
        verify(preferences).saveAccount(eq(account))
    }
}
"}

{"file_path":"/project/legacy/core/src/test/java/com/fsck/k9/preferences/SettingsExporterInboxFolderNameTest.kt","content":"package com.fsck.k9.preferences

import app.k9mail.legacy.mailstore.FolderRepository
import assertk.assertThat
import assertk.assertions.isEqualTo
import com.fsck.k9.K9RobolectricTest
import com.fsck.k9.Preferences
import com.fsck.k9.mail.AuthType
import com.fsck.k9.mail.ConnectionSecurity
import com.fsck.k9.mail.ServerSettings
import com.fsck.k9.notification.NotificationSettingsUpdater
import java.io.ByteArrayOutputStream
import java.util.UUID
import org.jdom2.Document
import org.jdom2.input.SAXBuilder
import org.junit.Test
import org.koin.core.component.inject
import org.mockito.kotlin.any
import org.mockito.kotlin.eq
import org.mockito.kotlin.mock
import org.mockito.kotlin.whenever
import org.robolectric.RuntimeEnvironment

class SettingsExporterInboxFolderNameTest : K9RobolectricTest() {
    private val preferences: Preferences by inject()

    @Test
    fun exportPreferences_shouldIncludeInboxFolderNameWhenInboxFolderIdIsSet() {
        // Arrange
        preferences.clearAccounts()

        val accountUuid = UUID.randomUUID().toString()
        val account = preferences.newAccount(accountUuid).apply {
            incomingServerSettings = ServerSettings(
                type = "imap",
                host = "example.com",
                port = 993,
                connectionSecurity = ConnectionSecurity.SSL_TLS_REQUIRED,
                authenticationType = AuthType.PLAIN,
                username = "user",
                password = "password",
                clientCertificateAlias = null,
            )
            outgoingServerSettings = ServerSettings(
                type = "smtp",
                host = "example.com",
                port = 465,
                connectionSecurity = ConnectionSecurity.SSL_TLS_REQUIRED,
                authenticationType = AuthType.PLAIN,
                username = "user",
                password = "password",
                clientCertificateAlias = null,
            )
            inboxFolderId = INBOX_FOLDER_ID
        }

        val folderRepository: FolderRepository = mock {
            whenever(it.getFolderServerId(eq(account), eq(INBOX_FOLDER_ID))).thenReturn("Inbox")
        }

        val folderSettingsProvider: FolderSettingsProvider = mock {
            whenever(it.getFolderSettings(any())).thenReturn(emptyList())
        }

        val notificationSettingsUpdater: NotificationSettingsUpdater = mock()

        val settingsExporter = SettingsExporter(
            contentResolver = RuntimeEnvironment.getApplication().contentResolver,
            preferences = preferences,
            folderSettingsProvider = folderSettingsProvider,
            folderRepository = folderRepository,
            notificationSettingsUpdater = notificationSettingsUpdater,
        )

        // Act
        val document = exportPreferences(settingsExporter, setOf(accountUuid))

        // Assert
        val accountElement = document.rootElement
            .getChild("accounts")
            .getChildren("account")
            .first { it.getAttributeValue("uuid") == accountUuid }

        val inboxFolderName = accountElement
            .getChild("settings")
            .getChildren("value")
            .first { it.getAttributeValue("key") == "inboxFolderName" }
            .text

        assertThat(inboxFolderName).isEqualTo("Inbox")
    }

    private fun exportPreferences(settingsExporter: SettingsExporter, accounts: Set<String>): Document {
        return ByteArrayOutputStream().use { outputStream ->
            settingsExporter.exportPreferences(outputStream, includeGlobals = false, accountUuids = accounts, includePasswords = false)
            SAXBuilder().build(outputStream.toByteArray().inputStream())
        }
    }

    companion object {
        private const val INBOX_FOLDER_ID = 23L
    }
}
"}
